description_long: This bungalow features a rectangular main structure with a flat roof and a bold red and white color scheme. The building is elevated, with a prominent wooden staircase and porch on one side, providing access to the main entrance. Large windows are symmetrically arranged on the front and sides, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The property includes an attached, single-story garage or auxiliary structure with a flat roof, extending from the main building. The surrounding area is covered with green lawn and a paved driveway, typical of suburban or urban residential lots. The overall design is modern and functional, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with red and white exterior, large windows, and an attached garage, set on a green lawn with a wooden porch and stairs.
description_view_0: Side view showing the main building's red and white facade, large windows, and the attached garage structure.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wooden staircase, porch, and symmetrical window arrangement on the main facade.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the rear of the garage and additional windows on the main building.
description_view_3: Back view showing the rear of the bungalow, the garage, and a secondary entrance with steps.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with additional side windows
